subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is not a princely state that merged with India after Independence?
question_hi: सन्तति से भारत से मंगलवर से संपत्ति को पहला प्रकार का राज्य है?
explanation_en: Merta is not a princely state that merged with India after Independence. It is a tehsil in Jaipur district. On the other hand, Alwar, Jodhpur, and Bikaner were all princely states that merged with India.
explanation_hi: सन्तति से भारत से प्रधान राज्य नहीं, इसका नाम अलवार, जोधपुर, और बिकानेर राज्यों से प्रधान राज्य को लेने करें
